nl_query: Which boards have a board coordinator who is also listed as a primary evaluator in the pool, and what is the total number of scripts that coordinator has evaluated versus coordinated?
failed_sql: SELECT b.id AS board_id, COUNT(s.id) AS total_scripts_evaluated, COUNT(h.id) AS total_scripts_coordinated FROM board b JOIN board_coordinator bc ON b.id = bc.board_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON bc.faculty_cache_id = fc.id JOIN script_assignment sa ON fc.id = sa.faculty_cache_id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON sa.assignment_id = ea.id WHERE fc.name = bc.name AND ea.attempt_type = 'PRIMARY' GROUP BY b.id
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (board_coordinator, evaluation_attempt, board, faculty_cache, script_assignment). You must qualify it with a table alias.
